pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep space and it hit me... like, everything we do, every single thing, is just a tiny blip in a universe that doesn't care. in a few billion years the sun is gonna die and everything will just be gone. everything we struggle for is literally zero. it actually makes me feel like there is no point in even trying anymore. why bother?

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the very embers of my soul. How heavy this silence has become, now that his promises have turned to ash. Is there truly any dignity left in a life so utterly broken?
